item.title: 随着内存接口芯片调查走向全球，韩国检察官突击搜查了 Rambus、Montage 和 Renesas
item.summary: South Korean prosecutors have opened a criminal front in a widening international investigation into alleged price-fixing of the small but critical chips that link AI processors to high-speed memory, raiding the local operations of three global suppliers on July 15.
